siteConfig.title: Ruturaj Patil | Python Full-Stack & AI/ML Developer

hero.name: Ruturaj Patil
hero.description: Passionate Python Full-Stack Developer with expertise in scalable web applications, REST APIs, and AI-powered systems. I also build privacy-focused intelligent solutions using RAG architectures and local LLM integrations for real-world business problems.

sections.title: About Me
overviewParagraphs: Hello! I'm Ruturaj Patil, a Python Full-Stack and AI/ML Developer passionate about building modern web applications and intelligent systems.
My expertise includes backend development using Python, Django, FastAPI, and Flask, API development, React frontend, PostgreSQL/MySQL, machine learning, and cloud deployment.
I specialize in RAG-based workflows and local LLM solutions, and I enjoy solving complex business problems through production-ready software engineering.

education.org: Dr. Babasaheb Ambedkar Technological University, Lonere
education.desc: Final Project: Intelligent offline AI assistant with voice/text interaction, face-recognition login, and local data storage.

items.company: Walstar Technologies Pvt Ltd | Kolhapur, India
tasks: Developed scalable backend systems using Python and Django.
Built RESTful APIs for enterprise applications.
Designed PostgreSQL databases and optimized queries.
Implemented authentication and role-based access control.
Integrated third-party APIs and automation workflows.
Collaborated with frontend and QA teams.
Designed and built a live Virtual Clothes Try-On web application using Django.
Worked on Python full-stack development using Flask and Django.
Implemented backend business logic and REST APIs with MySQL integration.
Contributed to debugging, optimization, and production stability.
Collaborated with senior engineers to improve code quality and reliability.

sections.title: Technical Skills
certifications: The Ultimate Job Ready Data Science Course (Code with Harry)
Artificial Intelligence Training (IIT Bombay, Mood Indigo)

projects.title: Enterprise Inventory Management System
projects.desc: Multi-branch inventory management platform with role-based access control, stock tracking, audit logs, notifications, and analytics dashboard.
features: Role-based access for admins and branch managers
Live stock tracking with audit logs

projects.title: AI Resume Screening Platform
projects.desc: AI-powered recruitment system with resume parsing, skill extraction, candidate ranking, and job matching analytics.
features: Resume parsing and skill extraction pipeline
Candidate ranking by JD matching score

projects.title: AI Customer Support Chatbot
projects.desc: Enterprise chatbot trained on company documents using RAG architecture, PDF processing, contextual responses, and authenticated knowledge search.
features: Secure contextual Q&A with source grounding
PDF ingestion and chunked vector search
outcomes: Improved response consistency for common issues

projects.title: Smart Expense Tracker
projects.desc: Personal finance app featuring expense categorization, budget management, AI insights, and reports.

projects.title: Predictive Maintenance System
projects.desc: Machine learning system for real-time monitoring, failure prediction, automated alerts, and operational dashboards.

projects.title: Virtual Try Room – AI-Powered Fashion E-Commerce Platform
projects.desc: A full-stack AI-powered fashion e-commerce platform that enables users to virtually try clothing items before purchasing using computer vision and AI-driven image processing.
features: AI Virtual Try-On: Real-time outfit visualization from user photos
User Management: JWT authentication, role-based access control
Product Management: Catalog, variants, inventory tracking
Shopping Experience: Cart management, wishlist, order tracking
Analytics Dashboard: Sales, product performance, virtual try-on usage
Admin Panel: Full administration of users, products, and orders
outcomes: Delivers an intelligent online shopping experience by combining e-commerce functionality with AI-driven fashion visualization.
Demonstrates expertise in full-stack development, database design, REST APIs, cloud integration, and AI-powered apps.
projects.problemStatement: Online fashion shopping suffers from high return rates because customers cannot accurately determine how clothing will look on them. This project provides AI-based virtual try-on functionality to improve customer confidence and reduce returns.
architecture: Backend: Python, Django, DRF, JWT Auth
AI Processing: Computer Vision Models, Virtual Try-On Engine
Cloud: AWS S3, Media Asset Management
highlights: Designed scalable full-stack REST API architecture
Optimized PostgreSQL schemas for e-commerce and analytics
Implemented cloud-based media storage and image processing pipelines

projects.title: RAG-Based AI Teaching Assistant
projects.desc: Built a RAG assistant over educational video content using Whisper transcription and vector search for accurate context retrieval.
outcomes: Faster learning support from long lectures
Improved retrieval quality for topic-specific queries

projects.title: College Food Court App
projects.desc: Designed and developed an Android app for online campus food ordering with a simple, student-friendly ordering flow.
features: Menu browsing and simple order placement

contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.description: I am currently open to new opportunities as a Python Full-Stack Developer and AI/ML Engineer. Whether you have a project, role, or question, I will be happy to connect.
